channel.title: Doctor on smpaget blog
channel.description: Recent content in Doctor on smpaget blog

item.title: Gratitude post.
item.description: I write this in the Interregnum between Mr And Dr. This in-between time allows me to express gratitude for my academic journey. My academic journey would not have been possible without my wife Helen and family. My family (and friends) supported and encouraged me to keep doing this. Thank you. I also wish to thank and remember people, including but not limited to those I mention below. However, to everyone involved in my journey, no matter how small. Thank you. I couldn’t have done it without you.
